raw_consumer_statement:
American Express Dispute No. XXXX Dispute amount : {$5800.00} Since XX/XX/XXXX, American Express has been repeatedly and automatically closing my dispute in favor of XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, citing outdated and invalid responses from the merchant. American Express has failed to uphold its obligation to act in my interest as a defrauded, exploited consumer. 
I have reason to believe that American Express did not forward the documents that I submitted on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX to the merchant. 
I resorted to opening a dispute with American Express because XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX was unwilling to discuss a fair resolution. 
For your review and evaluation, please see the attached letter dated XX/XX/XXXX and the corresponding Exhibits that I submitted to the American Express Dispute Department. 
American Express needs to review these documents and request a written response from XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX addressing my dispute. This matter should be resolved based on the documents I submitted to the Dispute Department.
